CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2026 Continued To Aug-26-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Unopposed Motion For Leave To File First Amended Class And Representative Action Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-02-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Alexus Johnson's unopposed Motion For Leave To File First Amended Class And Representative Action Complaint is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Plaintiff must lodge a proposed order that includes the above text no later than 8:30 am on April 2, 2026. Plaintiff shall send the proposed order by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org
No proposed order received. Plaintiff failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the Plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
